note: NEGATIVE. Tiled scan kernel: per-query count_ones (autovectorizes to VPOPCNTDQ over words) vs register-tiled (doc-word outer, scalar popcount, doc word kept in register across the tile). Register-tiling is 40-60% SLOWER -> it defeats VPOPCNTDQ (scalar popcount per word), and the doc was already L1-hot across the tile so the reuse it chased was free. Same lesson as 012. Default stays per-query; --tile-rt is opt-in.
